title: Pork and Purely Pale Croatian Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole that combines the flavors of Croatian cuisine with the richness of pork. This recipe is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Season the pork shoulder with salt and black pepper.
In a large skillet, cook the pork shoulder over medium-high heat until browned on all sides.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set it aside.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Stir in the casseroles sauce, tomato paste, salt, and black pepper.
Return the pork shoulder to the skillet and coat it with the sauce.
Transfer the pork and sauce to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the pork with breadcrumbs and grated cheddar cheese.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
